default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content production progress, analytics, and next steps for Hotel Engine's blog strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 16 approved topics and 18 in production](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Joel will be the new point person for content review, replacing James](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Analytics discussion focused on conversion tracking and isolating GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Hotel Engine's custom sentiment analysis tool could provide valuable insights for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [16 approved topics ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [18 topics in production](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Over 30 articles available, providing 6 weeks of content buffer](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [12 articles ready for Joel's review](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Publishing goal: average of 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Joel working on Amplitude dashboard for blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/s7e7uwt6TVK1UakfHmGDA5es_DmbzRkd?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
